# Product Reviews

Verified-purchase reviews carry a badge and are weighted more heavily in the average rating than unverified reviews. A review can be submitted up to ninety days after shipment, and reviews containing profanity or personal information are removed by moderation in under one business day.

[Source: product_information.md#product-reviews]
